mapper.select:
select sum(powerConsumption) dailyPowerConsumption, a.`day` uploadTime,a.devicelist_id, SUM(a.`value`) cumulativePowerConsumption, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(b.loop_name,'-',a.`value`) ORDER BY b.meter_index) powerDataValue from ( SELECT date_format(a.upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) `day`, ABS(a.`value` - b.`value`) AS powerConsumption,a.upload_time,a.`value`,a.unique_id,a.devicelist_id FROM ( select a.`name`,a.`value`,a.upload_time,a.unique_id,a.devicelist_id from tunnel_power_data a JOIN ( select DATE_FORMAT(upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS hour_group,MAX(upload_time) upload_time,unique_id from tunnel_power_data where `name`='IMPEP' AND unique_id in
#{ascUniqueId}
and upload_time >= DATE_SUB(#{analyzeDto.startTime},INTERVAL 1 DAY)
and upload_time <= concat(#{analyzeDto.endTime},' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY date_format(upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ),unique_id ORDER BY upload_time desc ) b ON DATE_FORMAT(a.upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = b.hour_group AND a.upload_time = b.upload_time and `name` = 'impep' and a.unique_id = b.unique_id AND a.unique_id in
#{ascUniqueId}
order by a.upload_time desc ) a JOIN ( select a.`name`,a.`value`,a.upload_time,a.unique_id from tunnel_power_data a JOIN ( select DATE_FORMAT(upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS hour_group,MAX(upload_time) upload_time,unique_id from tunnel_power_data where `name`='IMPEP' AND unique_id in
#{ascUniqueId}
and upload_time >= DATE_SUB(#{analyzeDto.startTime},INTERVAL 1 DAY)
and upload_time <= concat(#{analyzeDto.endTime},' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY date_format(upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ),unique_id ORDER BY upload_time desc ) b ON DATE_FORMAT(a.upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = b.hour_group AND a.upload_time = b.upload_time and `name` = 'impep' and a.unique_id = b.unique_id AND a.unique_id in
#{ascUniqueId}
order by a.upload_time desc ) b
ON date_format(a.upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) = DATE_ADD(date_format(b.upload_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ), INTERVAL 1 day) and a.unique_id = b.unique_id ) a left JOIN tunnel_power_edge_computing b on a.unique_id = b.unique_id GROUP BY a.`day` ORDER BY a.`day` desc

SELECT SUM(powerConsumption) totalLight, CAST(a.`month` AS UNSIGNED) `month` FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.upload_time, '%m') `month`, ABS(a.`value` - b.`value`) AS powerConsumption FROM ( SELECT a.`name`,a.`value`,a.upload_time,a.unique_id FROM tunnel_power_data a JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(upload_time, '%Y-%m') AS hour_group, MAX(upload_time) upload_time, unique_id FROM tunnel_power_data WHERE `name`='IMPEP' AND upload_time >= CONCAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(#{year},'-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR),'-12-01') AND upload_time <= CONCAT(#{year},'-12-31 23:59:59') AND unique_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT tpe.unique_id FROM t_user_tunnel u JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON u.tunnel_name_id = tdi.tunnel_id AND tdi.type = 2 JOIN tunnel_power_edge_computing tpe ON tdi.devicelist_id = tpe.devicelist_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(upload_time, '%Y-%m'), unique_id ) b ON DATE_FORMAT(a.upload_time, '%Y-%m') = b.hour_group AND a.upload_time = b.upload_time AND a.`name` = 'impep' AND a.unique_id = b.unique_id AND a.unique_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT tpe.unique_id FROM t_user_tunnel u JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON u.tunnel_name_id = tdi.tunnel_id AND tdi.type = 2 JOIN tunnel_power_edge_computing tpe ON tdi.devicelist_id = tpe.devicelist_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} ) AND DATE_FORMAT(a.upload_time, '%Y') = #{year} ) a JOIN ( SELECT a.`name`,a.`value`,a.upload_time,a.unique_id FROM tunnel_power_data a JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(upload_time, '%Y-%m') AS hour_group, MAX(upload_time) upload_time, unique_id FROM tunnel_power_data WHERE `name`='IMPEP' AND upload_time >= CONCAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(#{year},'-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR),'-12-01') AND upload_time <= CONCAT(#{year},'-12-31 23:59:59') AND unique_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT tpe.unique_id FROM t_user_tunnel u JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON u.tunnel_name_id = tdi.tunnel_id AND tdi.type = 2 JOIN tunnel_power_edge_computing tpe ON tdi.devicelist_id = tpe.devicelist_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(upload_time, '%Y-%m'), unique_id ) b ON DATE_FORMAT(a.upload_time, '%Y-%m') = b.hour_group AND a.upload_time = b.upload_time AND a.`name` = 'impep' AND a.unique_id = b.unique_id AND a.unique_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT tpe.unique_id FROM t_user_tunnel u JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON u.tunnel_name_id = tdi.tunnel_id AND tdi.type = 2 JOIN tunnel_power_edge_computing tpe ON tdi.devicelist_id = tpe.devicelist_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} ) ) b ON CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(a.upload_time, '%Y-%m'),'-01') = DATE_ADD(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(b.upload_time, '%Y-%m'),'-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND a.unique_id = b.unique_id GROUP BY a.`month` ORDER BY a.`month`
